title: <div><tt>This parsing grammar allows **mythic restructuring** of language, sound
content:
This parsing grammar allows **mythic restructuring** of language, sound, motion, and self.

---

## 🔀 MODULAR PATCHBAY STRUCTURE

RE:GE functions like a **symbolic modular synth**. Each module (or patch) can be added, routed, modulated, automated, or absorbed.

| Module Name | Description | Tags |
|-------------------------|----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------|-----------------|
| `ARC01 :: Story Forge` | Procedural myth generator. Loops through structure types (monomyth, tragedy, wave logic). | `GEN+`, `RIT+` |
| `ARC02 :: Self Mirror` | Turns your daily language into recursive symbolic reflections. Self-dialogue. | `MIR+`, `LANG+` |
| `RPG01 :: Avatar Forge`| Friend/foe/mentor mapping. Converts contacts into playable emotional RPG characters. | `MIR+`, `GEN+` |
context: From document: # Character Engine POV Critique — chunk 57 (chunk 57/206)
